name: Llama 3 70B
archDisplay: Dense transformer decoder with grouped-query attention (GQA), 128K-token vocabulary
note: Llama 3 flagship; Instruct checkpoint scored 82.0% MMLU and 81.7% HumanEval at launch, competitive with Gemini 1.5 Pro and beating Claude 3 Sonnet on several benchmarks. Officially English-only at this release (multilingual support came with Llama 3.1).
tpsNote: 70B at Q4 (~40GB) exceeds the 4090's 24GB VRAM and requires partial CPU-layer offload; ~18 tok/s reported for same-class 70B Llama checkpoints with most layers on GPU, dropping to 8-15 tok/s under heavier offload. Not independently verified for this exact checkpoint.
